304	end AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules
305	
306	namespace AlgebraicGeometry.Scheme.Modules
307	
308	/-- **Unit coherence (`map_id` keystone, `lem:gr_pullbackObjUnitToUnit_id`).** The
309	Mathlib free-pullback comparison `SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit` at the identity
310	morphism agrees, on the unit sheaf, with the scheme-level pseudofunctor identity
311	`Scheme.Modules.pullbackId`. Project-local: bridges `pullbackObjFreeIso` to the
312	pseudofunctor `pullbackId`. -/
313	lemma pullbackObjUnitToUnit_id {T : Scheme.{u}} :
314	    SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (𝟙 T))
315	      = (Scheme.Modules.pullbackId T).hom.app (SheafOfModules.unit T.ringCatSheaf) := by
316	  rw [← SheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction_homEquiv_symm_unitToPushforwardObjUnit,
317	    Equiv.symm_apply_eq, Adjunction.homEquiv_unit]
318	  have h := CategoryTheory.unit_conjugateEquiv Adjunction.id
319	    (SheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (𝟙 T)))
320	    (Scheme.Modules.pullbackId T).hom (SheafOfModules.unit T.ringCatSheaf)
321	  simp only [Adjunction.id_unit, NatTrans.id_app, Functor.id_obj] at h
322	  rw [← h]
323	  -- term-mode `id_comp` (positional `rw [Category.id_comp]` hits the `T.Modules` instance diamond)
324	  refine Eq.trans ?_ (Category.id_comp _).symm
325	  -- the `conjugateEquiv` term sits in unfolded `SheafOfModules` form; bridge to the
326	  -- scheme-level pseudofunctor coherence by defeq, then it equals `(pushforwardId).inv`.
327	  have key : (CategoryTheory.conjugateEquiv Adjunction.id
328	        (SheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (𝟙 T)))
329	        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackId T).hom)
330	      = (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardId T).inv :=
331	    Scheme.Modules.conjugateEquiv_pullbackId_hom T
332	  rw [key]
333	  ext Y
334	  -- both sides evaluate the unit section `1` through identity-like maps
335	  rfl
336	
337	/-- **Free coherence (`map_id`).** `pullbackFreeIso (𝟙 T) I` agrees, on the free sheaf,
338	with the pseudofunctor identity `pullbackId`. Reduces to `pullbackObjUnitToUnit_id` by
339	coproduct extensionality (`free = ∐ unit`). Project-local. -/
340	lemma pullbackFreeIso_id {T : Scheme.{u}} (I : Type u) :
341	    (Scheme.Modules.pullbackFreeIso (𝟙 T) I).hom
342	      = (Scheme.Modules.pullbackId T).hom.app (SheafOfModules.free (R := T.ringCatSheaf) I) := by
343	  haveI := Scheme.Modules.opensMap_final (𝟙 T)
344	  -- Use the `SheafOfModules.pullback` form in the cofan: the `Scheme.Modules.pullback` wrapper
345	  -- triggers a universe-polymorphism trap in the `PreservesColimit` instance search
346	  -- (memory `gf-seam1-1b1c-done`); the two forms are defeq, bridged by the explicit-type `have`s.
347	  refine Cofan.IsColimit.hom_ext (isColimitCofanMkObjOfIsColimit
348	    (SheafOfModules.pullback (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (𝟙 T))) _ _
349	    (SheafOfModules.isColimitFreeCofan (R := T.ringCatSheaf) I)) _ _ (fun i => ?_)
350	  simp only [cofan_mk_inj]
351	  -- Pure term-mode chain (positional `rw`/`simp` fail under the `SheafOfModules`/`X.Modules`
352	  -- instance diamond — they cannot match identical-printing terms with different implicit
353	  -- instance arguments; `exact`/`Eq.trans` unify up to defeq, which is what is needed here).
354	  -- LHS: free-pullback comparison.  Then transport the unit coherence through `· ≫ ιFree i`,
355	  -- and finally undo by naturality of `pullbackId.hom` (RHS).
356	  exact (SheafOfModules.pullback_map_ιFree_comp_pullbackObjFreeIso_hom
357	        (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (𝟙 T)) i).trans
358	      ((congrArg (· ≫ SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := T.ringCatSheaf) i) pullbackObjUnitToUnit_id).trans
359	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackId T).hom.naturality
360	          (SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := T.ringCatSheaf) i)).symm)
361	
362	/-- **Mate compatibility of `homEquiv`.** For adjunctions `adj₁ : L₁ ⊣ R₁`, `adj₂ : L₂ ⊣ R₂`
363	and a natural transformation `α : L₂ ⟶ L₁`, transposing `α.app c ≫ f` under `adj₂` equals
364	transposing `f` under `adj₁` post-composed with the conjugate transformation
365	(`CategoryTheory.conjugateEquiv adj₁ adj₂ α`) evaluated at `d`. Project-local; derived from
366	`CategoryTheory.unit_conjugateEquiv` + naturality of the conjugate transformation. -/
367	lemma homEquiv_conjugateEquiv_app {𝒞 𝒟 : Type*} [CategoryTheory.Category 𝒞]
368	    [CategoryTheory.Category 𝒟] {L₁ L₂ : 𝒞 ⥤ 𝒟} {R₁ R₂ : 𝒟 ⥤ 𝒞}
369	    (adj₁ : L₁ ⊣ R₁) (adj₂ : L₂ ⊣ R₂) (α : L₂ ⟶ L₁) {c : 𝒞} {d : 𝒟}
370	    (f : L₁.obj c ⟶ d) :
371	    adj₂.homEquiv c d (α.app c ≫ f)
372	      = adj₁.homEquiv c d f ≫ (CategoryTheory.conjugateEquiv adj₁ adj₂ α).app d := by
373	  -- `rw` is unreliable at locating these right-associated sub-composites, so we assemble the
374	  -- proof entirely from term-mode whiskering equalities and chain them with `.trans`.
375	  have h1 := CategoryTheory.unit_conjugateEquiv adj₁ adj₂ α c
376	  -- the two `homEquiv_unit` expansions, with all implicits fixed by the stated types.
377	  have huA : adj₂.homEquiv c d (α.app c ≫ f)
378	      = adj₂.unit.app c ≫ R₂.map (α.app c ≫ f) :=
379	    Adjunction.homEquiv_unit adj₂ c d (α.app c ≫ f)
380	  have huB : adj₁.homEquiv c d f = adj₁.unit.app c ≫ R₁.map f :=
381	    Adjunction.homEquiv_unit adj₁ c d f
382	  -- LHS transpose, in left-bracketed shape.
383	  have e1 : adj₂.homEquiv c d (α.app c ≫ f)
384	      = (adj₂.unit.app c ≫ R₂.map (α.app c)) ≫ R₂.map f :=
385	    huA.trans <| (CategoryTheory.whisker_eq (adj₂.unit.app c) (R₂.map_comp (α.app c) f)).trans
386	      (Category.assoc _ _ _).symm
387	  -- RHS transpose, in the same left-bracketed shape.
388	  have e2 : adj₁.homEquiv c d f ≫ (CategoryTheory.conjugateEquiv adj₁ adj₂ α).app d
389	      = (adj₁.unit.app c ≫ (CategoryTheory.conjugateEquiv adj₁ adj₂ α).app (L₁.obj c))
390	          ≫ R₂.map f :=
391	    (CategoryTheory.eq_whisker huB
392	        ((CategoryTheory.conjugateEquiv adj₁ adj₂ α).app d)).trans <|
393	      (Category.assoc _ _ _).trans <|
394	        (CategoryTheory.whisker_eq (adj₁.unit.app c)
395	          ((CategoryTheory.conjugateEquiv adj₁ adj₂ α).naturality f)).trans
396	          (Category.assoc _ _ _).symm
397	  exact e1.trans ((CategoryTheory.eq_whisker h1.symm (R₂.map f)).trans e2.symm)
398	
399	/-- **Unit coherence (`map_comp` keystone, `lem:gr_pullbackObjUnitToUnit_comp`).** The composite
400	analogue of `pullbackObjUnitToUnit_id`: the Mathlib free-pullback comparison at a composite
401	morphism `b ∘ a` factors through the pseudofunctor composition `pullbackComp`. Project-local.
402	
403	Transposing both sides under the composite pullback-pushforward adjunction: the LHS collapses
404	by `homEquiv_conjugateEquiv_app` to `uTPU (b ≫ a) ≫ (conjugate of pullbackComp.hom)`, the
405	conjugate is `(pushforwardComp).inv` via `conjugateEquiv_pullbackComp_inv` + `conjugateEquiv_comm`,
406	and the RHS collapses by `homEquiv` naturality to `uTPU a ≫ pushforward a (uTPU b)`;
407	both reduce to the unit-section identity (`pushforwardComp_inv_app_app = 𝟙`). -/
408	lemma pullbackObjUnitToUnit_comp {Tx Ty Tz : Scheme.{u}} (a : Ty ⟶ Tx) (b : Tz ⟶ Ty) :
409	    (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp b a).hom.app (SheafOfModules.unit Tx.ringCatSheaf) ≫
410	        SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (b ≫ a))
411	      = (Scheme.Modules.pullback b).map
412	          (SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom a)) ≫
413	        SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom b) := by
414	  -- Work with the Scheme-level adjunctions so `conjugateEquiv_pullbackComp_inv` lines up.
415	  apply ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction a).comp
416	      (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction b)).homEquiv _ _ |>.injective
417	  -- abbreviations
418	  set adjA := Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction a
419	  set adjB := Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction b
420	  set adjBA := Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (b ≫ a)
421	  -- LHS: collapse via the mate-compatibility helper (term-mode `.trans`, so `pullbackComp`
422	  -- stays OPAQUE and matching is up to defeq rather than syntactic `rw`).
423	  have hL := homEquiv_conjugateEquiv_app adjBA (adjA.comp adjB)
424	      (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp b a).hom
425	      (f := SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (b ≫ a)))
426	  -- transpose of `pullbackObjUnitToUnit` is `unitToPushforwardObjUnit` (used via defeq).
427	  have hL2 : adjBA.homEquiv _ _
428	        (SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (b ≫ a)))
429	      = SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (b ≫ a)) :=
430	    SheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction_homEquiv_pullbackObjUnitToUnit
431	      (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (b ≫ a))
432	  have huA : adjA.homEquiv _ _
433	        (SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom a))
434	      = SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom a) :=
435	    SheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction_homEquiv_pullbackObjUnitToUnit
436	      (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom a)
437	  have huB : adjB.homEquiv _ _
438	        (SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom b))
439	      = SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom b) :=
440	    SheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction_homEquiv_pullbackObjUnitToUnit
441	      (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom b)
442	  -- the conjugate of `pullbackComp.hom` is `(pushforwardComp).inv`.
443	  have hcomm := CategoryTheory.conjugateEquiv_comm (adj₁ := adjA.comp adjB) (adj₂ := adjBA)
444	    (show (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp b a).hom ≫ (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp b a).inv = 𝟙 _
445	      from (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp b a).hom_inv_id)
446	  rw [Scheme.Modules.conjugateEquiv_pullbackComp_inv] at hcomm
447	  have hConj : CategoryTheory.conjugateEquiv adjBA (adjA.comp adjB)
448	        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp b a).hom
449	      = (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp b a).inv :=
450	    (CategoryTheory.Iso.hom_comp_eq_id _).mp hcomm
451	  -- RHS computation, term-mode (so the Scheme/SheafOfModules `pullback` defeq is bridged).
452	  have hR : (adjA.comp adjB).homEquiv _ _
453	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback b).map
454	          (SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom a)) ≫
455	          SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom b))
456	      = SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom a) ≫
457	        (Scheme.Modules.pushforward a).map
458	          (SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom b)) := by
459	    rw [Adjunction.comp_homEquiv]
460	    change adjA.homEquiv _ _ (adjB.homEquiv _ _ (_ ≫ _)) = _
461	    rw [Adjunction.homEquiv_naturality_left, huB, Adjunction.homEquiv_naturality_right, huA]
462	    rfl
463	  -- the section-level identity: `(pushforwardComp).inv.app` is the identity on sections.
464	  have hMid : SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (b ≫ a)) ≫
465	        (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp b a).inv.app (SheafOfModules.unit Tz.ringCatSheaf)
466	      = SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom a) ≫
467	        (Scheme.Modules.pushforward a).map
468	          (SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom b)) := by
469	    -- definitional: `unitToPushforwardObjUnit` sections are `φ.hom.app`,
470	    -- `pushforwardComp_inv_app_app = 𝟙`, and `(b ≫ a)⁻¹ U = b⁻¹(a⁻¹ U)`.
471	    rfl
472	  -- assemble in steps to avoid a single large `isDefEq` over the opaque `pullbackComp`.
473	  have e1 := hL.trans (congrArg
474	    (· ≫ (CategoryTheory.conjugateEquiv adjBA (adjA.comp adjB)
475	            (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp b a).hom).app (SheafOfModules.unit Tz.ringCatSheaf)) hL2)
476	  have e2 := congrArg
477	    (SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (b ≫ a)) ≫
478	      NatTrans.app · (SheafOfModules.unit Tz.ringCatSheaf)) hConj
479	  exact e1.trans (e2.trans (hMid.trans hR.symm))
480	
481	/-- **Free coherence (`map_comp`).** Composite analogue of `pullbackFreeIso_id`: the
482	free-pullback isomorphism at a composite `b ∘ a` factors through the pseudofunctor composition
483	`pullbackComp`. Reduces, by coproduct extensionality (`free = ∐ unit`), to the unit coherence
484	`pullbackObjUnitToUnit_comp`. Project-local. -/
485	lemma pullbackFreeIso_comp {Tx Ty Tz : Scheme.{u}} (a : Ty ⟶ Tx) (b : Tz ⟶ Ty) (I : Type u) :
486	    (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp b a).hom.app (SheafOfModules.free (R := Tx.ringCatSheaf) I) ≫
487	        (pullbackFreeIso (b ≫ a) I).hom
488	      = (Scheme.Modules.pullback b).map (pullbackFreeIso a I).hom ≫
489	        (pullbackFreeIso b I).hom := by
490	  haveI := opensMap_final (b ≫ a)
491	  haveI := opensMap_final a
492	  haveI := opensMap_final b
493	  refine Cofan.IsColimit.hom_ext (isColimitCofanMkObjOfIsColimit
494	    (SheafOfModules.pullback (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom a) ⋙
495	      SheafOfModules.pullback (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom b)) _ _
496	    (SheafOfModules.isColimitFreeCofan (R := Tx.ringCatSheaf) I)) _ _ (fun i => ?_)
497	  simp only [cofan_mk_inj]
498	  -- Pure term-mode (positional `rw`/`simp` fail under the `SheafOfModules`/`X.Modules` diamond).
499	  -- Both injections reduce, via `pullbackComp.hom` naturality and the free-cofan comparison
500	  -- `pullback_map_ιFree_comp_pullbackObjFreeIso_hom`, to `pullbackObjUnitToUnit_comp` whiskered.
501	  -- the free-cofan comparison, restated in `pullbackFreeIso` form (defeq) so `congrArg` matches.
502	  -- each pullback changes the base ring sheaf: `Tx ↝ Ty ↝ Tz`.
503	  have key_ba : (Scheme.Modules.pullback (b ≫ a)).map
504	          (SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := Tx.ringCatSheaf) i) ≫
505	        (pullbackFreeIso (b ≫ a) I).hom
506	      = SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (b ≫ a)) ≫
507	        SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := Tz.ringCatSheaf) i :=
508	    SheafOfModules.pullback_map_ιFree_comp_pullbackObjFreeIso_hom
509	      (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (b ≫ a)) (I := I) i
510	  have key_a : (Scheme.Modules.pullback a).map (SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := Tx.ringCatSheaf) i) ≫
511	        (pullbackFreeIso a I).hom
512	      = SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom a) ≫
513	        SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := Ty.ringCatSheaf) i :=
514	    SheafOfModules.pullback_map_ιFree_comp_pullbackObjFreeIso_hom
515	      (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom a) (I := I) i
516	  have key_b : (Scheme.Modules.pullback b).map (SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := Ty.ringCatSheaf) i) ≫
517	        (pullbackFreeIso b I).hom
518	      = SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom b) ≫
519	        SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := Tz.ringCatSheaf) i :=
520	    SheafOfModules.pullback_map_ιFree_comp_pullbackObjFreeIso_hom
521	      (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom b) (I := I) i
522	  -- LHS: naturality of `pullbackComp.hom` + free-cofan comparison at `b ≫ a`.
523	  have hLHS :
524	      (SheafOfModules.pullback (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom a) ⋙
525	          SheafOfModules.pullback (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom b)).map
526	            (SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := Tx.ringCatSheaf) i) ≫
527	        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp b a).hom.app (SheafOfModules.free (R := Tx.ringCatSheaf) I) ≫
528	          (pullbackFreeIso (b ≫ a) I).hom
529	      = ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp b a).hom.app (SheafOfModules.unit Tx.ringCatSheaf) ≫
530	          SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (b ≫ a))) ≫
531	            (SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := Tz.ringCatSheaf) i) :=
532	    calc (SheafOfModules.pullback (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom a) ⋙
533	            SheafOfModules.pullback (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom b)).map
534	            (SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := Tx.ringCatSheaf) i) ≫
535	          (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp b a).hom.app (SheafOfModules.free (R := Tx.ringCatSheaf) I) ≫
536	            (pullbackFreeIso (b ≫ a) I).hom
537	        = ((SheafOfModules.pullback (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom a) ⋙
538	              SheafOfModules.pullback (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom b)).map
539	              (SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := Tx.ringCatSheaf) i) ≫
540	            (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp b a).hom.app
541	              (SheafOfModules.free (R := Tx.ringCatSheaf) I)) ≫
542	            (pullbackFreeIso (b ≫ a) I).hom := (Category.assoc _ _ _).symm
543	      _ = ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp b a).hom.app (SheafOfModules.unit Tx.ringCatSheaf) ≫
544	            (Scheme.Modules.pullback (b ≫ a)).map (SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := Tx.ringCatSheaf) i)) ≫
545	            (pullbackFreeIso (b ≫ a) I).hom :=
546	          congrArg (· ≫ (pullbackFreeIso (b ≫ a) I).hom)
547	            ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp b a).hom.naturality
548	              (SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := Tx.ringCatSheaf) i))
549	      _ = (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp b a).hom.app (SheafOfModules.unit Tx.ringCatSheaf) ≫
550	            (Scheme.Modules.pullback (b ≫ a)).map (SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := Tx.ringCatSheaf) i) ≫
551	              (pullbackFreeIso (b ≫ a) I).hom := Category.assoc _ _ _
552	      _ = (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp b a).hom.app (SheafOfModules.unit Tx.ringCatSheaf) ≫
553	            SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (b ≫ a)) ≫
554	              (SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := Tz.ringCatSheaf) i) :=
555	          congrArg ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp b a).hom.app
556	            (SheafOfModules.unit Tx.ringCatSheaf) ≫ ·) key_ba
557	      _ = ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp b a).hom.app (SheafOfModules.unit Tx.ringCatSheaf) ≫
558	            SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom (b ≫ a))) ≫
559	              (SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := Tz.ringCatSheaf) i) := (Category.assoc _ _ _).symm
560	  -- RHS: split the composite functor, free-cofan comparison at `a` then at `b`.
561	  have hmid :
562	      (SheafOfModules.pullback (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom a) ⋙
563	          SheafOfModules.pullback (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom b)).map
564	            (SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := Tx.ringCatSheaf) i) ≫
565	        (Scheme.Modules.pullback b).map (pullbackFreeIso a I).hom
566	      = (Scheme.Modules.pullback b).map
567	            (SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom a)) ≫
568	          (Scheme.Modules.pullback b).map (SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := Ty.ringCatSheaf) i) :=
569	    ((Scheme.Modules.pullback b).map_comp
570	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback a).map (SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := Tx.ringCatSheaf) i))
571	        (pullbackFreeIso a I).hom).symm.trans
572	      ((congrArg (Scheme.Modules.pullback b).map key_a).trans
573	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback b).map_comp
574	          (SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom a))
575	          (SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := Ty.ringCatSheaf) i)))
576	  have hRHS :
577	      (SheafOfModules.pullback (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom a) ⋙
578	          SheafOfModules.pullback (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom b)).map
579	            (SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := Tx.ringCatSheaf) i) ≫
580	        (Scheme.Modules.pullback b).map (pullbackFreeIso a I).hom ≫ (pullbackFreeIso b I).hom
581	      = ((Scheme.Modules.pullback b).map
582	            (SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom a)) ≫
583	          SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom b)) ≫
584	            (SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := Tz.ringCatSheaf) i) :=
585	    calc (SheafOfModules.pullback (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom a) ⋙
586	            SheafOfModules.pullback (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom b)).map
587	            (SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := Tx.ringCatSheaf) i) ≫
588	          (Scheme.Modules.pullback b).map (pullbackFreeIso a I).hom ≫ (pullbackFreeIso b I).hom
589	        = ((SheafOfModules.pullback (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom a) ⋙
590	              SheafOfModules.pullback (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom b)).map
591	              (SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := Tx.ringCatSheaf) i) ≫
592	            (Scheme.Modules.pullback b).map (pullbackFreeIso a I).hom) ≫
593	            (pullbackFreeIso b I).hom := (Category.assoc _ _ _).symm
594	      _ = ((Scheme.Modules.pullback b).map
595	              (SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom a)) ≫
596	            (Scheme.Modules.pullback b).map (SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := Ty.ringCatSheaf) i)) ≫
597	            (pullbackFreeIso b I).hom := congrArg (· ≫ (pullbackFreeIso b I).hom) hmid
598	      _ = (Scheme.Modules.pullback b).map
599	              (SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom a)) ≫
600	            (Scheme.Modules.pullback b).map (SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := Ty.ringCatSheaf) i) ≫
601	              (pullbackFreeIso b I).hom := Category.assoc _ _ _
602	      _ = (Scheme.Modules.pullback b).map
603	              (SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom a)) ≫
604	            SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom b) ≫
605	              (SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := Tz.ringCatSheaf) i) :=
606	          congrArg ((Scheme.Modules.pullback b).map
607	            (SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom a)) ≫ ·) key_b
608	      _ = ((Scheme.Modules.pullback b).map
609	              (SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom a)) ≫
610	            SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom b)) ≫
611	              (SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := Tz.ringCatSheaf) i) := (Category.assoc _ _ _).symm
612	  exact hLHS.trans ((congrArg (· ≫ (SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := Tz.ringCatSheaf) i))
613	    (pullbackObjUnitToUnit_comp a b)).trans hRHS.symm)
614	
615	/-! ### Cast-collapse of `pullbackCongr` against the free-pullback comparisons
616	
617	The three transports of the bundle cocycle are interleaved with `pullbackCongr` casts
618	(the `glueData_bridge_*` endpoint alignments). The next three lemmas collapse those casts
619	against the free-pullback comparisons `pullbackFreeIso`. Each is generic in the (equal)
620	base morphisms and proved by `subst`, so applying them never forces the kernel to whnf a
621	concrete immersion (the `pullbackFreeIso_trans_symm_eqToIso` discipline). -/
622	
623	/-- Closed zig-zag: `Q_φ⁻¹ ≫ pullbackCongr(h).app ≫ Q_ψ = 𝟙` for equal base morphisms
624	`φ = ψ`. Project-local helper for the C2 endpoint alignment. -/
625	@[reassoc]
626	lemma pullbackFreeIso_inv_congr_hom {T' T : Scheme.{u}} {φ ψ : T' ⟶ T} (h : φ = ψ)
627	    (I : Type u) :
628	    (pullbackFreeIso φ I).inv ≫
629	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr h).app
630	          (SheafOfModules.free (R := T.ringCatSheaf) I)).hom ≫
631	        (pullbackFreeIso ψ I).hom
632	      = 𝟙 _ := by
633	  subst h
634	  simp [Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr]
635	
636	/-- Left absorption: `pullbackCongr(h).app ≫ Q_ψ = Q_φ` for equal base morphisms `φ = ψ`.
637	Project-local helper for the C2 endpoint alignment (source bridge). -/
638	@[reassoc]
639	lemma pullbackCongr_hom_app_free {T' T : Scheme.{u}} {φ ψ : T' ⟶ T} (h : φ = ψ)
640	    (I : Type u) :
641	    ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr h).app
642	        (SheafOfModules.free (R := T.ringCatSheaf) I)).hom ≫
643	        (pullbackFreeIso ψ I).hom
644	      = (pullbackFreeIso φ I).hom := by
645	  subst h
646	  simp [Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr]
647	
648	/-- Right absorption: `Q_φ⁻¹ ≫ pullbackCongr(h).app = Q_ψ⁻¹` for equal base morphisms
649	`φ = ψ`. Project-local helper for the C2 endpoint alignment (target bridge). -/
650	@[reassoc]
651	lemma pullbackFreeIso_inv_congr {T' T : Scheme.{u}} {φ ψ : T' ⟶ T} (h : φ = ψ)
652	    (I : Type u) :
653	    (pullbackFreeIso φ I).inv ≫
654	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr h).app
655	          (SheafOfModules.free (R := T.ringCatSheaf) I)).hom
656	      = (pullbackFreeIso ψ I).inv := by
657	  subst h
658	  simp [Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr]
659	
660	/-- Inverse-side absorption of the congruence cast against the free-pullback comparison:
661	`pullbackCongr(h).inv.app ≫ Q_φ = Q_ψ` for equal base morphisms `φ = ψ`. Generic-`subst`
662	companion of `pullbackCongr_hom_app_free`. Project-local helper for the tautological
663	quotient overlap. -/
664	@[reassoc]
665	lemma pullbackCongr_inv_app_free {T' T : Scheme.{u}} {φ ψ : T' ⟶ T} (h : φ = ψ)
666	    (I : Type u) :
667	    (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr h).inv.app
668	        (SheafOfModules.free (R := T.ringCatSheaf) I) ≫
669	        (pullbackFreeIso φ I).hom
670	      = (pullbackFreeIso ψ I).hom := by
671	  subst h
672	  simp [Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr]
673	
674	/-- Cancellation of the pseudofunctor-composition cast against the pulled-back source
675	comparison: `(pullbackComp b a).inv.app (free) ≫ (pullback b).map Q_a = Q_{b≫a} ≫ Q_b⁻¹`.
676	Direct consequence of the free coherence `pullbackFreeIso_comp`. Project-local helper for
677	the tautological quotient overlap. -/
678	@[reassoc]
679	lemma pullbackComp_inv_app_free_map {V U X : Scheme.{u}} (b : V ⟶ U) (a : U ⟶ X)
680	    (I : Type u) :
681	    (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp b a).inv.app
682	        (SheafOfModules.free (R := X.ringCatSheaf) I) ≫
683	        (Scheme.Modules.pullback b).map (pullbackFreeIso a I).hom
684	      = (pullbackFreeIso (b ≫ a) I).hom ≫ (pullbackFreeIso b I).inv := by
685	  rw [Iso.eq_comp_inv, Category.assoc]
686	  -- `erw` (defeq matching) to fire the free coherence through the `X.Modules` diamond
687	  erw [← pullbackFreeIso_comp a b I]
688	  exact Iso.inv_hom_id_app_assoc (Scheme.Modules.pullbackComp b a) _ _
689	
690	/-! ### Adjunction transposition of the descent-equalizer legs
691	
692	The overlap condition consumed by `glueLift` is an equation between composites of adjoint
693	transposes along the chart immersions. The next two lemmas transpose each leg back across
694	the pullback–pushforward adjunction of the *composite* overlap immersion, exposing the
695	pullback-level identity `g_{ij} ∘ f_ij^* u^i = (t_ij ≫ f_ji)^* u^j` that the matrix
696	computation closes. The first handles the unit/`pushforwardComp` factor pair, the second
697	the trailing `pushforwardCongr` reindexing cast. -/
698	
699	/-- **Leg transpose** (`lem:gr_tautologicalQuotientComponent_transpose` engine): for

200	/-- An invertible `d × d` matrix of global sections induces an automorphism of the free
201	rank-`d` sheaf `O_S^d`. Project-local — the `GL_d` data underlying the bundle transitions. -/
202	noncomputable def matrixToFreeIso {S : Scheme.{0}} {d : ℕ}
203	    (M N : Matrix (Fin d) (Fin d) Γ(S, ⊤)) (hMN : M * N = 1) (hNM : N * M = 1) :
204	    SheafOfModules.free (R := S.ringCatSheaf) (Fin d) ≅
205	      SheafOfModules.free (R := S.ringCatSheaf) (Fin d) where
206	  hom := matrixEnd M
207	  inv := matrixEnd N
208	  hom_inv_id := by rw [matrixEnd_comp, hNM, matrixEnd_one]
209	  inv_hom_id := by rw [matrixEnd_comp, hMN, matrixEnd_one]
210	
211	@[simp] lemma matrixToFreeIso_hom {S : Scheme.{0}} {d : ℕ}
212	    (M N : Matrix (Fin d) (Fin d) Γ(S, ⊤)) (hMN : M * N = 1) (hNM : N * M = 1) :
213	    (matrixToFreeIso M N hMN hNM).hom = matrixEnd M := rfl
214	
215	/-- **Matrix automorphisms compose multiplicatively** (`lem:gr_matrixToFreeIso_mul`): the
216	forward maps of two matrix automorphisms compose to `matrixEnd` of the matrix product (with
217	the order reversed by the column/component contravariance). This is the linkage that turns
218	the matrix-level Cramer-inverse cocycle into a composition identity of sheaf-of-module
219	isomorphisms. Project-local. -/
220	lemma matrixToFreeIso_mul {S : Scheme.{0}} {d : ℕ}
221	    (A A' B B' : Matrix (Fin d) (Fin d) Γ(S, ⊤))
222	    (hAA' : A * A' = 1) (hA'A : A' * A = 1) (hBB' : B * B' = 1) (hB'B : B' * B = 1) :
223	    (matrixToFreeIso A A' hAA' hA'A).hom ≫ (matrixToFreeIso B B' hBB' hB'B).hom
224	      = matrixEnd (B * A) := by
225	  rw [matrixToFreeIso_hom, matrixToFreeIso_hom, matrixEnd_comp]
226	
227	@[simp] lemma matrixToFreeIso_inv {S : Scheme.{0}} {d : ℕ}
228	    (M N : Matrix (Fin d) (Fin d) Γ(S, ⊤)) (hMN : M * N = 1) (hNM : N * M = 1) :
229	    (matrixToFreeIso M N hMN hNM).inv = matrixEnd N := rfl
230	
231	/-! ## The rectangular matrix homomorphism of free sheaves
232	
233	The chart quotient `u^I` is "left multiplication by the `d × r` universal matrix `X^I`";
234	to manipulate it under pullback and against the square `GL_d` transitions we generalise
235	the square `matrixEnd` API to rectangular matrices (`def:gr_matrixEndRect`,
236	`lem:gr_matrixEndRect_comp`; the pullback naturality `lem:gr_matrixEndRect_pullback` comes
237	after the scalar atom below). -/
238	
239	/-- A `d × r` matrix of global sections of `O_S` realised as a morphism of free sheaves
240	`O_S^r ⟶ O_S^d` (`def:gr_matrixEndRect`): the `(p,q)`-entry acts as `scalarEnd`, assembled
241	over the two biproducts exactly as the square `matrixEnd` and the chart quotient
242	`chartQuotientMap` (which is by construction `matrixEndRect` of the injected universal
243	matrix). Project-local. -/
244	noncomputable def matrixEndRect {S : Scheme.{0}} {d r : ℕ}
245	    (M : Matrix (Fin d) (Fin r) Γ(S, ⊤)) :
246	    SheafOfModules.free (R := S.ringCatSheaf) (Fin r) ⟶
247	      SheafOfModules.free (R := S.ringCatSheaf) (Fin d) :=
248	  (biproduct.isoCoproduct (fun _ : Fin r => SheafOfModules.unit S.ringCatSheaf)).symm.hom ≫
249	    biproduct.matrix (fun i p => scalarEnd (M p i)) ≫
250	    (biproduct.isoCoproduct (fun _ : Fin d => SheafOfModules.unit S.ringCatSheaf)).hom
251	
252	/-- Composition of two `biproduct.matrix` morphisms with a rectangular first factor —
253	the categorical matrix product. Project-local helper for `matrixEndRect_comp`. -/
254	private lemma biproduct_matrix_comp_rect {S : Scheme.{0}} {d r : ℕ}
255	    (mM : Fin r → Fin d →
256	      (SheafOfModules.unit S.ringCatSheaf ⟶ SheafOfModules.unit S.ringCatSheaf))
257	    (mN : Fin d → Fin d →
258	      (SheafOfModules.unit S.ringCatSheaf ⟶ SheafOfModules.unit S.ringCatSheaf)) :
259	    biproduct.matrix (f := fun _ : Fin r => SheafOfModules.unit S.ringCatSheaf)
260	        (g := fun _ : Fin d => SheafOfModules.unit S.ringCatSheaf) mM ≫ biproduct.matrix mN
261	      = biproduct.matrix (fun i q => ∑ p, mM i p ≫ mN p q) := by
262	  refine biproduct.hom_ext' _ _ (fun i => biproduct.hom_ext _ _ (fun q => ?_))
263	  simp only [Category.assoc, biproduct.ι_matrix_assoc, biproduct.matrix_π, biproduct.lift_desc,
264	    biproduct.ι_matrix, biproduct.lift_π]
265	
266	/-- **Square-after-rectangular composition law** (`lem:gr_matrixEndRect_comp`):
267	`matrixEndRect M ≫ matrixEnd N = matrixEndRect (N * M)` for `M : d × r`, `N : d × d` —
268	the matrix product, with the order reversed by the contravariance of the column/component
269	indexing exactly as in `matrixEnd_comp`. Project-local. -/
270	@[reassoc]
271	lemma matrixEndRect_comp {S : Scheme.{0}} {d r : ℕ}
272	    (M : Matrix (Fin d) (Fin r) Γ(S, ⊤)) (N : Matrix (Fin d) (Fin d) Γ(S, ⊤)) :
273	    matrixEndRect M ≫ matrixEnd N = matrixEndRect (N * M) := by
274	  rw [matrixEndRect, matrixEnd, matrixEndRect]
275	  have hcomp : biproduct.matrix (fun (i : Fin r) (p : Fin d) => scalarEnd (M p i))
276	        ≫ biproduct.matrix (fun (i : Fin d) (p : Fin d) => scalarEnd (N p i))
277	      = biproduct.matrix (fun (i : Fin r) (p : Fin d) => scalarEnd ((N * M) p i)) := by
278	    rw [biproduct_matrix_comp_rect]
279	    congr 1
280	    funext i q
281	    simp_rw [scalarEnd_comp]
282	    rw [← scalarEnd_sum, Matrix.mul_apply]
283	    exact congrArg scalarEnd (Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun p _ => mul_comm _ _))
284	  simp only [Category.assoc, Iso.symm_hom, Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc]
285	  rw [← Category.assoc (biproduct.matrix (fun (i : Fin r) (p : Fin d) => scalarEnd (M p i))),
286	    hcomp]
287	
288	/-! ## The tautological quotient on the charts -/
289	
290	/-- The **chart quotient** `u^I : O_{U^I}^r → O_{U^I}^d` (`def:gr_chart_quotient`):
291	left multiplication by the universal matrix `X^I` (`universalMatrix`). It is realised as
292	the morphism of free sheaves of modules whose matrix of components, in the standard bases
293	`(e_{i'})_{i' : Fin r}` and `(e_p)_{p : Fin d}`, is the universal matrix `X^I` injected
294	into the structure sheaf via `Scheme.ΓSpecIso`. Since the `I`-minor of `X^I` is the
295	identity, `u^I` is a split surjection onto the free rank-`d` sheaf.
296	
297	Project-local: Mathlib has no "matrix ↦ morphism of free sheaves" primitive. -/
298	noncomputable def chartQuotientMap (d r : ℕ) (I : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d) :
299	    SheafOfModules.free (R := (affineChart d r I).ringCatSheaf) (Fin r) ⟶
300	      SheafOfModules.free (R := (affineChart d r I).ringCatSheaf) (Fin d) :=
301	  let A := CommRingCat.of (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ I}) ℤ)
302	  let R := (affineChart d r I).ringCatSheaf
303	  haveI : HasFiniteBiproducts (SheafOfModules R) :=
304	    HasFiniteBiproducts.of_hasFiniteProducts
305	  let M : ∀ (_ : Fin r) (_ : Fin d), SheafOfModules.unit R ⟶ SheafOfModules.unit R :=
306	    fun i' p => scalarEnd ((Scheme.ΓSpecIso A).inv.hom ((universalMatrix d r I hI) p i'))
307	  (biproduct.isoCoproduct (fun _ : Fin r => SheafOfModules.unit R)).symm.hom ≫
308	    biproduct.matrix M ≫
309	    (biproduct.isoCoproduct (fun _ : Fin d => SheafOfModules.unit R)).hom
310	
311	/-- The chart quotient `u^I` sends the `(I.orderIsoOfFin k)`-th basis section of
312	`O_{U^I}^r` to the `k`-th basis section of `O_{U^I}^d`. Project-local: the column-`I`
313	restriction of `u^I` is the identity, the matrix-level content of `lem:gr_chartQuotientMap_epi`. -/
314	private lemma chartQuotientMap_ιFree (d r : ℕ) (I : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d)
315	    (k : Fin d) :
316	    SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := (affineChart d r I).ringCatSheaf)
317	        ((I.orderIsoOfFin hI k : Fin r)) ≫ chartQuotientMap d r I hI
318	      = SheafOfModules.ιFree k := by
319	  set A := CommRingCat.of (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ I}) ℤ) with hA
320	  set S := AlgebraicGeometry.Spec A with hS
321	  haveI : HasFiniteBiproducts (SheafOfModules S.ringCatSheaf) :=
322	    HasFiniteBiproducts.of_hasFiniteProducts
323	  change SheafOfModules.ιFree (↑((I.orderIsoOfFin hI) k)) ≫
324	      ((biproduct.isoCoproduct
325	            (fun _ : Fin r => SheafOfModules.unit S.ringCatSheaf)).symm.hom ≫
326	        biproduct.matrix (fun (i' : Fin r) (p : Fin d) => scalarEnd
327	          ((Scheme.ΓSpecIso A).inv.hom (universalMatrix d r I hI p i'))) ≫
328	        (biproduct.isoCoproduct
329	            (fun _ : Fin d => SheafOfModules.unit S.ringCatSheaf)).hom)
330	      = SheafOfModules.ιFree k
331	  rw [Iso.symm_hom, SheafOfModules.ιFree, biproduct.isoCoproduct_inv]
332	  erw [Sigma.ι_desc_assoc]
333	  rw [biproduct.ι_matrix_assoc, biproduct.isoCoproduct_hom]
334	  have h1 : (CommRingCat.Hom.hom (Scheme.ΓSpecIso A).inv) (1 : A) = 1 := map_one _
335	  have h0 : (CommRingCat.Hom.hom (Scheme.ΓSpecIso A).inv) (0 : A) = 0 := map_zero _
336	  have hsub := universalMatrix_submatrix_self d r I hI
337	  have lift_eq :
338	      (biproduct.lift fun p : Fin d => scalarEnd
339	          ((Scheme.ΓSpecIso A).inv.hom (universalMatrix d r I hI p (↑((I.orderIsoOfFin hI) k)))))
340	        = biproduct.ι (fun _ : Fin d => SheafOfModules.unit S.ringCatSheaf) k := by
341	    refine biproduct.hom_ext _ _ (fun p => ?_)
342	    rw [biproduct.lift_π]
343	    have hentry : universalMatrix d r I hI p (↑((I.orderIsoOfFin hI) k))
344	        = (1 : Matrix (Fin d) (Fin d) A) p k :=
345	      congrFun (congrFun hsub p) k
346	    rw [hentry, Matrix.one_apply]
347	    by_cases hpk : p = k
348	    · rw [if_pos hpk, h1, scalarEnd_one, hpk, biproduct.ι_π_self]
349	    · rw [if_neg hpk, h0, scalarEnd_zero, biproduct.ι_π_ne _ (Ne.symm hpk)]
350	  rw [lift_eq, biproduct.ι_desc]
351	  rfl
352	
353	/-- **The chart quotient is an epimorphism** (`lem:gr_chartQuotientMap_epi`): `u^I` is split
354	by the coordinate inclusion `s_I` of the `I`-indexed columns, hence is a (split) epimorphism
355	of sheaves of modules. -/
356	lemma chartQuotientMap_epi (d r : ℕ) (I : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d) :
357	    Epi (chartQuotientMap d r I hI) := by
358	  have hsplit : SheafOfModules.freeMap (R := (affineChart d r I).ringCatSheaf)
359	        (fun j : Fin d => (I.orderIsoOfFin hI j : Fin r)) ≫ chartQuotientMap d r I hI
360	      = 𝟙 (SheafOfModules.free (R := (affineChart d r I).ringCatSheaf) (Fin d)) := by
361	    refine Cofan.IsColimit.hom_ext (SheafOfModules.isColimitFreeCofan (Fin d)) _ _ (fun k => ?_)
362	    have key : SheafOfModules.ιFree (R := (affineChart d r I).ringCatSheaf) k ≫
363	          (SheafOfModules.freeMap (fun j : Fin d => (I.orderIsoOfFin hI j : Fin r)) ≫
364	            chartQuotientMap d r I hI)
365	        = SheafOfModules.ιFree k :=
366	      (SheafOfModules.ιFree_freeMap_assoc (fun j : Fin d => (I.orderIsoOfFin hI j : Fin r)) k
367	        (chartQuotientMap d r I hI)).trans (chartQuotientMap_ιFree d r I hI k)
368	    exact key.trans (Category.comp_id _).symm
369	  exact (IsSplitEpi.mk' ⟨_, hsplit⟩).epi
370	
371	end AlgebraicGeometry.Grassmannian
372	
373	namespace AlgebraicGeometry.Grassmannian
374	
375	/-! ## The GL_d bundle transition cocycle
376	
377	The universal quotient `U` is glued from the per-chart free rank-`d` sheaves `O_{U^I}^d`
378	along the bundle transitions `g_{I,J} = (X^I_J)⁻¹`, realised as matrix automorphisms via
379	`matrixToFreeIso` and conjugated to the overlap pullbacks by `pullbackFreeIso`. This section
380	constructs `bundleTransition` and proves its self-identity (C1); the triple-overlap
381	multiplicativity (C2) is the matrix cocycle of `lem:gr_cocycle` transported to the common
382	overlap by `pullbackBaseChangeTransport`/`glueData_bridge_*`. -/
383	
384	/-- The Cramer inverse of the self-minor `X^I_I` is the identity: since `X^I_I = 1`
385	(`universalMatrix_submatrix_self`) its inverse is `1`. Project-local; underlies C1. -/
386	lemma universalMinorInv_self (d r : ℕ) (I : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d) :
387	    universalMinorInv d r I I hI hI = 1 := by
388	  have hmin : universalMinor d r I I hI hI = 1 := by
389	    rw [universalMinor, universalMatrix_submatrix_self, Matrix.map_one _ (map_zero _) (map_one _)]
390	  rw [universalMinorInv, hmin, inv_one]
391	
392	/-- The injected Cramer inverse and minor matrices over the overlap structure sheaf are
393	mutually inverse — the `GL_d` invertibility hypotheses for `matrixToFreeIso`. Project-local. -/
394	private lemma bundleMatrix_cancel (d r : ℕ) (I J : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d)
395	    (hJ : J.card = d) :
396	    ((Scheme.ΓSpecIso
397	        (CommRingCat.of (Localization.Away (minorDet d r I J hI hJ)))).inv.hom.mapMatrix
398	        (universalMinorInv d r I J hI hJ)) *
399	      ((Scheme.ΓSpecIso
400	        (CommRingCat.of (Localization.Away (minorDet d r I J hI hJ)))).inv.hom.mapMatrix
401	        (universalMinor d r I J hI hJ)) = 1 ∧
402	    ((Scheme.ΓSpecIso
403	        (CommRingCat.of (Localization.Away (minorDet d r I J hI hJ)))).inv.hom.mapMatrix
404	        (universalMinor d r I J hI hJ)) *
405	      ((Scheme.ΓSpecIso
406	        (CommRingCat.of (Localization.Away (minorDet d r I J hI hJ)))).inv.hom.mapMatrix
407	        (universalMinorInv d r I J hI hJ)) = 1 := by
408	  refine ⟨?_, ?_⟩
409	  · rw [← map_mul, (universalMinorInv_mul_cancel d r I J hI hJ).1, map_one]
410	  · rw [← map_mul, (universalMinorInv_mul_cancel d r I J hI hJ).2, map_one]
411	
412	/-- The **bundle transition** `g_{I,J}` (`def:gr_bundleTransition`): the isomorphism of
413	sheaves of modules on the overlap `U^I_J` induced by the invertible matrix
414	`(X^I_J)⁻¹ = universalMinorInv d r I J`. It identifies the pullback of `O_{U^I}^d` along
415	`f_{IJ}` with the pullback of `O_{U^J}^d` along `t_{IJ} ≫ f_{JI}`, by conjugating the
416	matrix automorphism `matrixToFreeIso (X^I_J)⁻¹` (built like `chartQuotientMap`) by the
417	free-pullback comparisons `pullbackFreeIso`. -/
418	noncomputable def bundleTransition (d r : ℕ) (I J : Finset (Fin r))
419	    (hI : I.card = d) (hJ : J.card = d) :
420	    (Scheme.Modules.pullback (chartIncl d r I J hI hJ)).obj
421	        (SheafOfModules.free (R := (affineChart d r I).ringCatSheaf) (Fin d)) ≅
422	      (Scheme.Modules.pullback (chartTransition d r I J hI hJ ≫ chartIncl d r J I hJ hI)).obj
423	        (SheafOfModules.free (R := (affineChart d r J).ringCatSheaf) (Fin d)) :=
424	  Scheme.Modules.pullbackFreeIso (chartIncl d r I J hI hJ) (Fin d) ≪≫
425	    matrixToFreeIso
426	      ((Scheme.ΓSpecIso
427	          (CommRingCat.of (Localization.Away (minorDet d r I J hI hJ)))).inv.hom.mapMatrix
428	        (universalMinorInv d r I J hI hJ))
429	      ((Scheme.ΓSpecIso
430	          (CommRingCat.of (Localization.Away (minorDet d r I J hI hJ)))).inv.hom.mapMatrix
431	        (universalMinor d r I J hI hJ))
432	      (bundleMatrix_cancel d r I J hI hJ).1
433	      (bundleMatrix_cancel d r I J hI hJ).2 ≪≫
434	    (Scheme.Modules.pullbackFreeIso
435	      (chartTransition d r I J hI hJ ≫ chartIncl d r J I hJ hI) (Fin d)).symm
436	
437	/-- **Self-identity of the bundle transition (C1)** (`lem:gr_bundleCocycle_id`): on the
438	diagonal overlap `U^I_I` (where `t_{II} = 𝟙`) the bundle transition is the identity, in the
439	form required by the gluing primitive `Scheme.Modules.glue`. The matrix part is the identity
440	since `(X^I_I)⁻¹ = 1` (`universalMinorInv_self`), so `matrixEnd 1 = 𝟙` (`matrixEnd_one`); the
441	two free-pullback comparisons then cancel into the `eqToIso` transport.
442	
443	Resource note (iter-060): the former `set_option maxHeartbeats 1000000 in` override is
444	removed and the proof rebuilt as a *leaner term* that the kernel checks within the default
445	budget (the earlier `.hom`-level cast chain hit a `(kernel) deterministic timeout` at default
446	heartbeats and an OOM ceiling on cold builds at `1000000`). The new term works at the **iso
447	level**: the matrix automorphism is collapsed to `Iso.refl` in the lightweight single-overlap
448	context (`hB`, free sheaves only — no pullback), and the two free-pullback comparisons cancel
449	through the *generic* lemma `pullbackFreeIso_trans_symm_eqToIso` (proved by `subst` on
450	variable morphisms), so the kernel never whnfs the concrete immersions `chartIncl` /
451	`chartTransition`. -/
452	theorem bundleTransition_self (d r : ℕ) (I : Finset (Fin r)) (hI : I.card = d) :
453	    bundleTransition d r I I hI hI
454	      = eqToIso (congrArg
455	          (fun φ => (Scheme.Modules.pullback φ).obj
456	            (SheafOfModules.free (R := (affineChart d r I).ringCatSheaf) (Fin d)))
457	          (show chartIncl d r I I hI hI
458	              = chartTransition d r I I hI hI ≫ chartIncl d r I I hI hI from by
459	            rw [chartTransition_self, Category.id_comp])) := by
460	  have hφ : chartIncl d r I I hI hI
461	      = chartTransition d r I I hI hI ≫ chartIncl d r I I hI hI := by
462	    rw [chartTransition_self, Category.id_comp]
463	  -- The matrix automorphism is the identity iso: `(X^I_I)⁻¹` injects to the identity matrix,
464	  -- so its `matrixEnd` is `𝟙`. Proved here over the single overlap chart (no pullback types).
465	  have hB : matrixToFreeIso
466	        ((Scheme.ΓSpecIso
467	            (CommRingCat.of (Localization.Away (minorDet d r I I hI hI)))).inv.hom.mapMatrix
468	          (universalMinorInv d r I I hI hI))
469	        ((Scheme.ΓSpecIso
470	            (CommRingCat.of (Localization.Away (minorDet d r I I hI hI)))).inv.hom.mapMatrix
471	          (universalMinor d r I I hI hI))
472	        (bundleMatrix_cancel d r I I hI hI).1
473	        (bundleMatrix_cancel d r I I hI hI).2
474	      = Iso.refl _ := by
475	    apply Iso.ext
476	    rw [matrixToFreeIso_hom, Iso.refl_hom, universalMinorInv_self, map_one, matrixEnd_one]
477	  -- Unfold the transition, collapse the identity matrix factor (`erw` to bridge the
478	  -- `chartOverlap`/`Spec` defeq on the inferred base scheme), and cancel the comparisons.
479	  simp only [bundleTransition]
480	  erw [hB, Iso.refl_trans]
481	  exact Scheme.Modules.pullbackFreeIso_trans_symm_eqToIso hφ (Fin d)
482	
483	/-- The bundle transition data packaged over the Grassmannian glue datum, ready to feed the
484	gluing primitive `Scheme.Modules.glue`. Project-local. -/
485	noncomputable def bundleTransitionData (d r : ℕ) :
486	    ∀ (I J : (theGlueData d r).J),
487	      (Scheme.Modules.pullback ((theGlueData d r).f I J)).obj
488	          (SheafOfModules.free (R := ((theGlueData d r).U I).ringCatSheaf) (Fin d)) ≅
489	        (Scheme.Modules.pullback ((theGlueData d r).t I J ≫ (theGlueData d r).f J I)).obj
490	          (SheafOfModules.free (R := ((theGlueData d r).U J).ringCatSheaf) (Fin d)) :=
491	  fun I J => bundleTransition d r I.1 J.1 I.2 J.2
492	
493	/-! ### The matrix-level Cramer-inverse cocycle (L1)
494	
495	The matrix-algebra core of (C2) is the Cramer-inverse cocycle
496	`(X^J_K)⁻¹ (X^I_J)⁻¹ = (X^I_K)⁻¹` over the triple-overlap ring `S_I = R^I[1/(P^I_J P^I_K)]`.
497	Its proof reduces to the image-matrix cocycle `cocycle_imageMatrix_eq` of
498	`GrassmannianCells` by taking the `I`-minor. That lemma and the matrix helpers it depends on
499	are `private` in `GrassmannianCells.lean`, so they are reproduced here as project-local
500	helpers (the proofs are verbatim ports of the known-good originals). -/
501	
502	/-- Port of `GrassmannianCells.mul_submatrix_col` (private there). -/
503	private lemma mul_submatrix_col' {d r : ℕ} {R : Type*} [CommRing R]
504	    (A : Matrix (Fin d) (Fin d) R) (B : Matrix (Fin d) (Fin r) R) (g : Fin d → Fin r) :
505	    (A * B).submatrix id g = A * B.submatrix id g := by
506	  ext i j; simp [Matrix.mul_apply, Matrix.submatrix_apply]
507	
508	/-- Port of `GrassmannianCells.map_nonsing_inv` (private there). -/
509	private lemma map_nonsing_inv' {n : ℕ} {R S : Type*} [CommRing R] [CommRing S] (f : R →+* S)
510	    (A : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) R) (h : IsUnit A.det) :

891	/-! ### Restriction of the glued sheaf to a chart (`def:gr_modules_glueRestrictionIso`)
892	
893	The glued sheaf is the descent equalizer `eq(a, b) ⊆ ∏ᵢ (ιᵢ)_* Mᵢ`. This section
894	re-exposes the two legs of that equalizer as standalone declarations
895	(`glueLegA`/`glueLegB`), records that `glue` *is* their equalizer (`glueIsoEqualizer`,
896	definitional), and produces the canonical projection `glueProj i` of the glued sheaf
897	onto the `i`-th pushforward factor together with its compatibility with `glueLift`.
898	The adjoint transpose of `glueProj i` along the chart immersion `D.ι i` is the
899	*restriction morphism* `glueRestrictionHom i : ιᵢ^* (glue …) ⟶ M i`; effective descent
900	(consuming the cocycle hypotheses C1/C2) makes it an isomorphism — the restriction
901	isomorphism `glueRestrictionIso` of `def:gr_modules_glueRestrictionIso`. The
902	limit-preservation engine is `restrictFunctor`: pullback along an open immersion is
903	naturally isomorphic to a site-level pushforward, which is a right adjoint, hence
904	preserves the descent equalizer and the pushforward product. -/

906	/-- `restrictFunctor f` along an open immersion is a right adjoint: it is a site-level
907	pushforward of sheaves of modules, whose left adjoint (the site-level pullback) exists
908	by the presheaf-pullback + sheafification construction. Project-local instance. -/
909	instance restrictFunctor_isRightAdjoint {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : X ⟶ Y) [IsOpenImmersion f] :
910	    (restrictFunctor f).IsRightAdjoint := by
911	  delta restrictFunctor
912	  -- bare `infer_instance` fails on the outer search; the explicit presheaf-pullback +
913	  -- sheafification construction elaborates (its three instance hypotheses all resolve)
914	  exact (SheafOfModules.PullbackConstruction.adjunction _).isRightAdjoint
915	
916	/-- `restrictFunctor f` along an open immersion preserves limits (it is a right
917	adjoint). Project-local. -/
918	noncomputable instance restrictFunctor_preservesLimits.{w, w'} {X Y : Scheme.{u}}
919	    (f : X ⟶ Y) [IsOpenImmersion f] :
920	    PreservesLimitsOfSize.{w, w'} (restrictFunctor f) :=
921	  (Adjunction.ofIsRightAdjoint (restrictFunctor f)).rightAdjoint_preservesLimits
922	
923	/-- **Pullback of sheaves of modules along an open immersion preserves limits**: it is
924	naturally isomorphic to `restrictFunctor f`, a site-level pushforward and right

926	equalizer. Project-local. -/
927	instance pullback_preservesLimits_of_isOpenImmersion.{w, w'} {X Y : Scheme.{u}}

929	    PreservesLimitsOfSize.{w, w'} (Scheme.Modules.pullback f) :=

934	-- NOTE: `glue`/`glueLift` elaborated universe-monomorphic at `Scheme.GlueData.{0}`
935	-- (their universe was pinned during elaboration); the restriction layer follows suit.
936	variable (D : Scheme.GlueData.{0}) (M : ∀ i, (D.U i).Modules)
937	
938	/-- The product of pushforwards `∏ᵢ (ιᵢ)_* Mᵢ` into which the glued sheaf embeds.
939	Project-local helper re-exposing the `P` of `glue`. -/
940	noncomputable def glueProd : D.glued.Modules :=
941	  ∏ᶜ fun i => (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.ι i)).obj (M i)
942	
943	/-- The overlap product `∏_{(i,j)} (f_ij ≫ ιᵢ)_* (f_ij^* Mᵢ)` receiving the two descent
944	legs. Project-local helper re-exposing the `Qfun`-product of `glue`. -/
945	noncomputable def glueOverlapProd : D.glued.Modules :=
946	  ∏ᶜ fun p : D.J × D.J =>
947	    (Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.f p.1 p.2 ≫ D.ι p.1)).obj
948	      ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f p.1 p.2)).obj (M p.1))

950	/-- First descent leg (`a` of `glue`): on the `(i,j)`-component, restrict the `i`-th
951	chart section to the overlap `V (i,j)` via the unit of the pullback–pushforward
952	adjunction along `f_ij` and the pushforward-composition comparison. Project-local. -/
953	noncomputable def glueLegA : glueProd D M ⟶ glueOverlapProd D M :=
954	  Pi.lift fun p => Pi.π _ p.1 ≫
955	    ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.ι p.1)).map
956	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction (D.f p.1 p.2)).unit.app (M p.1)) ≫
957	      (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp (D.f p.1 p.2) (D.ι p.1)).hom.app
958	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f p.1 p.2)).obj (M p.1)))

960	/-- Second descent leg (`b` of `glue`): on the `(i,j)`-component, restrict the `j`-th
961	chart section, transport it across the transition isomorphism `g_ij`, and reindex the
962	immersion via the glue condition. Project-local. -/
963	noncomputable def glueLegB
964	    (g : ∀ i j, (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f i j)).obj (M i) ≅
965	        (Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t i j ≫ D.f j i)).obj (M j)) :

968	    ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward (D.ι p.2)).map

970	          (D.t p.1 p.2 ≫ D.f p.2 p.1)).unit.app (M p.2)) ≫
971	      (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardComp (D.t p.1 p.2 ≫ D.f p.2 p.1) (D.ι p.2)).hom.app
972	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.t p.1 p.2 ≫ D.f p.2 p.1)).obj (M p.2)) ≫
973	      (Scheme.Modules.pushforward
974	        ((D.t p.1 p.2 ≫ D.f p.2 p.1) ≫ D.ι p.2)).map (g p.1 p.2).inv ≫
975	      (Scheme.Modules.pushforwardCongr
976	        (show (D.t p.1 p.2 ≫ D.f p.2 p.1) ≫ D.ι p.2 = D.f p.1 p.2 ≫ D.ι p.1 by
977	          rw [Category.assoc]; exact D.glue_condition p.1 p.2)).hom.app
978	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback (D.f p.1 p.2)).obj (M p.1)))

983	      (show D.f i i = D.t i i ≫ D.f i i by rw [D.t_id i, Category.id_comp])))
984	  (hC2 : ∀ i j k,
985	      pullbackBaseChangeTransport (pullback.fst (D.f i j) (D.f i k))

988	        pullbackBaseChangeTransport (D.t' i j k ≫ pullback.fst (D.f j k) (D.f j i))
989	          (D.f j k) (D.t j k ≫ D.f k j) (g j k) ≪≫
990	        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr (glueData_bridge_tgt D i j k)).app (M k)
991	      = (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr (glueData_bridge_src D i j k)).app (M i) ≪≫
992	        pullbackBaseChangeTransport (pullback.snd (D.f i j) (D.f i k))
993	          (D.f i k) (D.t i k ≫ D.f k i) (g i k))

639	/-- **Cramer-inverse cocycle on the triple overlap (L1)** (`lem:gr_bundleCocycle_matrix`):

641	the localised minors satisfy the multiplicative cocycle identity
642	`(X^J_K)⁻¹ (X^I_J)⁻¹ = (X^I_K)⁻¹`. This is the pure matrix-algebra core of (C2), independent
643	of any sheaf data. Project-local. -/
644	theorem bundleTransition_cocycle_matrix (d r : ℕ) (I J K : Finset (Fin r))
645	    (hI : I.card = d) (hJ : J.card = d) (hK : K.card = d) :
646	    (universalMinorInv d r J K hJ hK).map
647	        ((cocycleΘIJ d r I J K hI hJ hK).comp
648	          (awayInclRight (minorDet d r J I hJ hI) (minorDet d r J K hJ hK)))
649	      * (universalMinorInv d r I J hI hJ).map
650	          (awayInclLeft (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK))
651	      = (universalMinorInv d r I K hI hK).map
652	          (awayInclRight (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK)) := by
653	  -- Take the `I`-minor (columns indexed by `I`) of the image-matrix cocycle.
654	  have hcol := congrArg
655	    (fun M : Matrix (Fin d) (Fin r) (Localization.Away
656	        (minorDet d r I J hI hJ * minorDet d r I K hI hK)) =>
657	      M.submatrix id (fun j : Fin d => (I.orderIsoOfFin hI j : Fin r)))
658	    (cocycle_imageMatrix_eq' d r I J K hI hJ hK)
659	  simp only at hcol
660	  -- LHS of `hcol` is `(X^I_K)⁻¹` over `S_I`.
661	  rw [Matrix.submatrix_map, imageMatrix_submatrix_I] at hcol
662	  -- RHS of `hcol`: push the `I`-minor through the outer map.
663	  rw [Matrix.submatrix_map] at hcol
664	  -- `imageMatrix J K = (X^J_K)⁻¹ * X^J`, so its `I`-minor splits off the inverse factor;
665	  -- the second factor is `X^J` (over `R^J[1/P^J_K]`) restricted to the `I`-columns.
666	  have hsplit : (imageMatrix d r J K hJ hK).submatrix id
667	        (fun j : Fin d => (I.orderIsoOfFin hI j : Fin r))
668	      = universalMinorInv d r J K hJ hK *
669	        ((universalMatrix d r J hJ).map
670	          (algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ J}) ℤ)
671	            (Localization.Away (minorDet d r J K hJ hK)))).submatrix id
672	          (fun j : Fin d => (I.orderIsoOfFin hI j : Fin r)) := by
673	    rw [imageMatrix]; exact mul_submatrix_col' _ _ _
674	  rw [hsplit, Matrix.map_mul] at hcol
675	  -- The comp identity `θ_{I,J}` realises the cross-localisation map on `R^J`.
676	  have hχ : ((cocycleΘIJ d r I J K hI hJ hK).comp
677	        (awayInclRight (minorDet d r J I hJ hI) (minorDet d r J K hJ hK))).comp
678	          (algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ J}) ℤ)
679	            (Localization.Away (minorDet d r J K hJ hK)))
680	      = (awayInclLeft (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK)).comp
681	          (transitionPreMap d r I J hI hJ).toRingHom := by
682	    rw [RingHom.comp_assoc, awayInclRight_comp_algebraMap, cocycleΘIJ]
683	    exact IsLocalization.Away.lift_comp _ _
684	  have e1 : (universalMatrix d r J hJ).map
685	        ((awayInclLeft (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK)).comp
686	          (transitionPreMap d r I J hI hJ).toRingHom)
687	      = (imageMatrix d r I J hI hJ).map
688	          (awayInclLeft (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK)) := by
689	    rw [← map_map_eq_of_comp' (universalMatrix d r J hJ)
690	        (transitionPreMap d r I J hI hJ).toRingHom
691	        (awayInclLeft (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK)) _ rfl]
692	    congr 1
693	    exact universalMatrix_map_transitionPreMap d r I J hI hJ
694	  -- The base change of `X^J|_I` over `θ_{I,J}` is `(X^I_J)⁻¹` over `S_I`.
695	  have hXJI : (((universalMatrix d r J hJ).map
696	          (algebraMap (MvPolynomial (Fin d × {q : Fin r // q ∉ J}) ℤ)
697	            (Localization.Away (minorDet d r J K hJ hK)))).submatrix id
698	          (fun j : Fin d => (I.orderIsoOfFin hI j : Fin r))).map
699	          ((cocycleΘIJ d r I J K hI hJ hK).comp
700	            (awayInclRight (minorDet d r J I hJ hI) (minorDet d r J K hJ hK)))
701	      = (universalMinorInv d r I J hI hJ).map
702	          (awayInclLeft (minorDet d r I J hI hJ) (minorDet d r I K hI hK)) := by
703	    rw [Matrix.submatrix_map, map_map_eq_of_comp' _ _ _ _ hχ, ← Matrix.submatrix_map, e1,
704	      Matrix.submatrix_map, imageMatrix_submatrix_I]
705	  rw [hXJI] at hcol
706	  exact hcol.symm

708	/-! ### L3 transport: `scalarEnd`/`matrixEnd` naturality under pullback
709	
710	The substantive new infrastructure for (C2). The atom is `scalarEnd_pullback`: pulling back a
711	scalar endomorphism `scalarEnd a` along a scheme morphism `p` is, after the unit-pullback
712	comparison `pullbackObjUnitToUnit`, the scalar endomorphism of the base-changed function
713	`p.appTop a`. Its proof transposes the naturality square under the pullback-pushforward
714	adjunction to a `unit`-level identity, which holds by naturality of the comorphism `p.c`. -/
715	
716	/-- The reduced (transposed) form of the scalar-naturality atom: on the unit sheaf,
717	multiplication by `a` followed by the comorphism `unitToPushforwardObjUnit` equals the
718	comorphism followed by the pushforward of multiplication by `p.appTop a`. Project-local
719	helper for `scalarEnd_pullback`. -/
720	lemma unitToPushforward_scalarEnd_comm {T S : Scheme.{0}} (p : T ⟶ S) (a : Γ(S, ⊤)) :
721	    scalarEnd a ≫ SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom p)
722	      = SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom p) ≫
723	        (Scheme.Modules.pushforward p).map (scalarEnd (p.appTop a)) := by
724	  apply ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward p).obj
725	    (SheafOfModules.unit T.ringCatSheaf)).unitHomEquiv.injective
726	  refine PresheafOfModules.sections_ext _ _ (fun Y => ?_)
727	  -- Both `.val Y` are nested applications (no morphism composite) up to defeq, since
728	  -- `unitHomEquiv (f ≫ p) = sectionsMap p (unitHomEquiv f)` and `sectionsMap`/`unitHomEquiv`
729	  -- are `rfl`/`sectionsMk`-defined; rewrite into that form via `change`.
730	  change (SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom p)).val.app Y
731	        ((scalarEnd a).val.app Y (1 : S.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj Y))
732	      = ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward p).map
733	            (scalarEnd ((Scheme.Hom.appTop p) a))).val.app Y
734	        ((SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom p)).val.app Y
735	          (1 : S.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj Y))
736	  rw [scalarEnd_val_app_one, SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit_val_app_apply,
737	    SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit_val_app_apply, map_one]
738	  -- Goal: `φ.hom.app Y (a|_Y) = ((pushforward p).map (scalarEnd (p.appTop a))).val.app Y 1`.
739	  -- RHS reduces (defeq, the pushforward's `map`-application is `rfl` + `scalarEnd_val_app_one`)
740	  -- to `T.ringCatSheaf.obj.map (homOfLE le_top).op (p.appTop a)`; LHS rewrites to the same by
741	  -- naturality of the comorphism `(toRingCatSheafHom p).hom` at `(homOfLE le_top).op : op ⊤ ⟶ Y`.
742	  have hnat := ConcreteCategory.congr_hom
743	    ((Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom p).hom.naturality (homOfLE (le_top : Y.unop ≤ ⊤)).op) a
744	  rw [CategoryTheory.comp_apply, CategoryTheory.comp_apply] at hnat
745	  rw [hnat]
746	  -- The RHS pushforward (its `map`-application is `rfl` on sections) evaluates the
747	  -- scalar endomorphism `scalarEnd (p.appTop a)` at `1` over the preimage open; both sides are
748	  -- then `T.ringCatSheaf.obj.map (homOfLE le_top).op (p.appTop a)` (the `homOfLE`s agree by
749	  -- proof irrelevance, the comorphism by `forget₂`-on-elements), so `scalarEnd_val_app_one` closes.
750	  exact (scalarEnd_val_app_one ((Scheme.Hom.appTop p) a)
751	    (Opposite.op ((TopologicalSpace.Opens.map p.base).obj (Opposite.unop Y)))).symm

753	/-- **ATOM: scalar endomorphism naturality under pullback** (`lem:gr_scalarEnd_pullback`).
754	For `p : T ⟶ S` and `a ∈ Γ(S,⊤)`, pulling back the scalar endomorphism `scalarEnd a` is,
755	after the unit-pullback comparison `q = pullbackObjUnitToUnit`, the scalar endomorphism of the
756	base-changed function `p.appTop a`:
757	`(pullback p).map (scalarEnd a) ≫ q = q ≫ scalarEnd (p.appTop a)`.
758	Proved by transposing under the pullback-pushforward adjunction to
759	`unitToPushforward_scalarEnd_comm`.
760	Project-local — the single irreducible new claim underlying `matrixEnd_pullback`. -/
761	lemma scalarEnd_pullback {T S : Scheme.{0}} (p : T ⟶ S) (a : Γ(S, ⊤)) :
762	    (Scheme.Modules.pullback p).map (scalarEnd a) ≫
763	        SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom p)
764	      = SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom p) ≫
765	        scalarEnd (p.appTop a) := by
766	  apply (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction p).homEquiv
767	    (SheafOfModules.unit S.ringCatSheaf) (SheafOfModules.unit T.ringCatSheaf) |>.injective
768	  -- `homEquiv_naturality_left` collapses the LHS transpose; the RHS transpose
769	  -- (`homEquiv_naturality_right`) is supplied as a term because positional `rw` cannot match
770	  -- the identical-printing `homEquiv` under the `X.Modules` diamond (memory
771	  -- `grquot-functor-dropped-termmode`).
772	  -- `hq` is the lemma `..._homEquiv_pullbackObjUnitToUnit` restated in the `Scheme.Modules`
773	  -- adjunction form (defeq to the `SheafOfModules` form), so `rw`/`congrArg` match syntactically.
774	  have hq : (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction p).homEquiv
775	        (SheafOfModules.unit S.ringCatSheaf) (SheafOfModules.unit T.ringCatSheaf)
776	        (SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom p))
777	      = SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom p) :=
778	    SheafOfModules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction_homEquiv_pullbackObjUnitToUnit _
779	  rw [Adjunction.homEquiv_naturality_left, hq]
780	  refine (unitToPushforward_scalarEnd_comm p a).trans ?_
781	  exact (((Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction p).homEquiv_naturality_right
782	        (SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom p))
783	        (scalarEnd (p.appTop a))).trans
784	      (congrArg (· ≫ (Scheme.Modules.pushforward p).map (scalarEnd (p.appTop a))) hq)).symm

799	/-- **(a) Matrix endomorphism naturality under pullback** (`lem:gr_matrixEnd_pullback`).
800	For `p : T ⟶ S` and `M : Matrix (Fin d) (Fin d) Γ(S,⊤)`, the pullback of the matrix

802	the matrix endomorphism of the base-changed matrix `p.appTop • M` (entrywise comorphism):
803	`(pullback p).map (matrixEnd M) = Q.hom ≫ matrixEnd (p.appTop.mapMatrix M) ≫ Q.inv`.
804	Reduces, on each one-element biproduct component, to the scalar atom `scalarEnd_pullback`.

806	lemma matrixEnd_pullback {T S : Scheme.{0}} (p : T ⟶ S) {d : ℕ}
807	    (M : Matrix (Fin d) (Fin d) Γ(S, ⊤)) :
808	    (Scheme.Modules.pullback p).map (matrixEnd M)
809	      = (Scheme.Modules.pullbackFreeIso p (Fin d)).hom ≫
810	        matrixEnd ((CommRingCat.Hom.hom (Scheme.Hom.appTop p)).mapMatrix M) ≫
811	        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackFreeIso p (Fin d)).inv := by
812	  haveI := Scheme.Modules.opensMap_final p
813	  -- Reduce to the naturality square (cancel the trailing `Q.inv`).
814	  rw [← Category.assoc, Iso.eq_comp_inv]
815	  -- Check the two maps out of the coproduct `(pullback p).obj (free (Fin d))` agree on each
816	  -- free injection `(pullback p).map (ιFree i)` (the cofan of the preserved colimit).

818	    (isColimitCofanMkObjOfIsColimit (Scheme.Modules.pullback p) _ _
819	      (SheafOfModules.isColimitFreeCofan (Fin d))) _ _ (fun i => ?_)
820	  simp only [cofan_mk_inj, Cofan.mk_pt]
821	  -- `Q.hom` is, by construction of `pullbackFreeIso`, the Mathlib free-pullback comparison.
822	  have hQhom : (Scheme.Modules.pullbackFreeIso p (Fin d)).hom
823	      = (SheafOfModules.pullbackObjFreeIso (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom p) (Fin d)).hom := rfl
824	  -- The free injection cancels against `Q.hom` into the unit-pullback comparison
825	  -- (`pullbackObjUnitToUnit`), which is where `scalarEnd_pullback` lives.

827	      (Scheme.Modules.pullback p).map (SheafOfModules.ιFree k)
828	          ≫ (Scheme.Modules.pullbackFreeIso p (Fin d)).hom
829	        = SheafOfModules.pullbackObjUnitToUnit (Scheme.Hom.toRingCatSheafHom p)
830	            ≫ SheafOfModules.ιFree k := by
831	    intro k
832	    rw [hQhom]
833	    exact SheafOfModules.pullback_map_ιFree_comp_pullbackObjFreeIso_hom _ k
834	  -- LHS: `map (ιFree i) ≫ map (matrixEnd M)` collapses to `map (ιFree i ≫ matrixEnd M)`,
835	  -- then `ιFree_matrixEnd` turns it into a row sum, distributed by additivity of the pullback.
836	  rw [← Category.assoc ((Scheme.Modules.pullback p).map (SheafOfModules.ιFree i))
837	        ((Scheme.Modules.pullback p).map (matrixEnd M)),
838	    ← Functor.map_comp]

842	  rw [Preadditive.sum_comp]
843	  -- RHS: cancel `map (ιFree i) ≫ Q.hom` into `pullbackObjUnitToUnit ≫ ιFree i`, then expand.
844	  rw [← Category.assoc ((Scheme.Modules.pullback p).map (SheafOfModules.ιFree i))
845	        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackFreeIso p (Fin d)).hom,
846	    key i]
847	  erw [Category.assoc]
848	  erw [ιFree_matrixEnd ((CommRingCat.Hom.hom (Scheme.Hom.appTop p)).mapMatrix M) i]
849	  erw [Preadditive.comp_sum]
850	  -- Match term by term: each entry reduces to the scalar atom `scalarEnd_pullback`.
851	  refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun k _ => ?_)
852	  erw [Functor.map_comp]
853	  rw [Category.assoc, key k]
854	  erw [reassoc_of% scalarEnd_pullback p (M k i)]
855	  erw [Category.assoc]

1103	/-- **Overlap-square opens identity**: for an open `V` of the `i`-th chart of a scheme
1104	glue datum, the preimage under `ι_j` of its image in the glued scheme coincides with
1105	the image, under the `j`-side overlap immersion `t_ij ≫ f_ji`, of its preimage under
1106	`f_ij`. This is the underlying-opens form of the cartesianness of the chart-overlap
1107	square (`vPullbackCone`); it is the site-level input identifying the two composite
1108	restriction functors of the overlap square. Project-local. -/
1109	lemma glueData_preimage_image_eq (D : Scheme.GlueData.{0}) (i j : D.J)
1110	    (V : (D.U i).Opens) :
1111	    (D.ι j) ⁻¹ᵁ ((D.ι i) ''ᵁ V) = (D.t i j ≫ D.f j i) ''ᵁ ((D.f i j) ⁻¹ᵁ V) := by
1112	  ext x
1113	  constructor
1114	  · intro hx
1115	    -- a point of `U_j` mapping into `ι_i(V)` comes from the overlap via the glue relation
1116	    obtain ⟨y, hyV, hyx⟩ := hx
1117	    obtain ⟨w, hw1, hw2⟩ := (D.ι_eq_iff i j y x).mp hyx
1118	    exact ⟨w, show (D.f i j) w ∈ V from (show (D.f i j) w = y from hw1) ▸ hyV, hw2⟩

1430	/-! ### Bridges between the geometric and the site-level adjunction
1431	
1432	`Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction f` (the geometric adjunction, with the
1433	sheafification-built pullback) and `restrictAdjunction f` (the site-level adjunction
1434	along an open immersion, with concrete unit/counit) share the right adjoint
1435	`pushforward f`; `restrictFunctorIsoPullback f` is their `leftAdjointUniq`. The next
1436	lemmas transport units, counits and congruence casts across that identification —
1437	they are the vehicle by which the descent obligations are reduced to section-level
1438	computations. -/
1439	
1440	/-- **Unit comparison**: the geometric adjunction unit is the (concrete) site-level
1441	unit followed by the pushforward of the `leftAdjointUniq` comparison. Project-local. -/
1442	@[reassoc]
1443	lemma restrictAdjunction_unit_app_iso {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : X ⟶ Y) [IsOpenImmersion f]
1444	    (N : Y.Modules) :
1445	    (restrictAdjunction f).unit.app N ≫
1446	        (Scheme.Modules.pushforward f).map ((restrictFunctorIsoPullback f).hom.app N)
1447	      = (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction f).unit.app N :=
1448	  Adjunction.unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app _ _ _
1449	
1450	/-- **Counit comparison**: the `leftAdjointUniq` comparison followed by the geometric
1451	counit is the (concrete) site-level counit. Project-local. -/
1452	@[reassoc]
1453	lemma restrictFunctorIsoPullback_hom_app_counit {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (f : X ⟶ Y)
1454	    [IsOpenImmersion f] (N : X.Modules) :
1455	    (restrictFunctorIsoPullback f).hom.app ((Scheme.Modules.pushforward f).obj N) ≫
1456	        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackPushforwardAdjunction f).counit.app N
1457	      = (restrictAdjunction f).counit.app N :=
1458	  Adjunction.leftAdjointUniq_hom_app_counit _ _ _
1459	
1460	/-- The congruence cast of equal morphisms at the pullback-functor level, evaluated at
1461	an object, is the `eqToHom` of the object-level equality. Generic `subst` lemma.
1462	Project-local. -/
1463	lemma pullbackCongr_hom_app_eqToHom {X Y : Scheme.{u}} {φ ψ : X ⟶ Y} (h : φ = ψ)
1464	    (N : Y.Modules) :
1465	    (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr h).hom.app N
1466	      = eqToHom (congrArg (fun α => (Scheme.Modules.pullback α).obj N) h) := by
1467	  subst h
1468	  simp [Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr]
1469	
1470	/-- The site-level congruence cast at `rfl` is the identity. Project-local. -/
1471	lemma restrictFunctorCongr_rfl_hom_app {X Y : Scheme.{u}} (φ : X ⟶ Y) [IsOpenImmersion φ]
1472	    (N : Y.Modules) :
1473	    (restrictFunctorCongr (rfl : φ = φ)).hom.app N = 𝟙 _ := by
1474	  ext U x
1475	  rw [restrictFunctorCongr_hom_app_app]
1476	  -- `eqToHom` of a self-equality is definitionally the identity (proof irrelevance)
1477	  exact congr($(N.presheaf.map_id _) x)
1478	
1479	/-- **Congruence compatibility of the `leftAdjointUniq` comparison**: for equal open

1482	@[reassoc]
1483	lemma restrictFunctorIsoPullback_congr {X Y : Scheme.{u}} {φ ψ : X ⟶ Y} (h : φ = ψ)
1484	    [IsOpenImmersion φ] [IsOpenImmersion ψ] (N : Y.Modules) :
1485	    (restrictFunctorIsoPullback φ).hom.app N ≫ (Scheme.Modules.pullbackCongr h).hom.app N

1487	  subst h
1488	  rw [pullbackCongr_hom_app_eqToHom, restrictFunctorCongr_rfl_hom_app, eqToHom_refl,
1489	    Category.comp_id, Category.id_comp]

1133	
1134	Support for the covering proof `chartLocus_isOpenCover`: the fully rectangular

1138	/-- For a square matrix the square and rectangular matrix endomorphisms coincide

1140	lemma matrixEnd_eq_matrixEndRect {S : Scheme.{0}} {d : ℕ}

1150	private lemma biproduct_matrix_comp_rect₂ {S : Scheme.{0}} {n e d : ℕ}
1151	    (mA : Fin n → Fin e →
1152	      (SheafOfModules.unit S.ringCatSheaf ⟶ SheafOfModules.unit S.ringCatSheaf))
1153	    (mB : Fin e → Fin d →
1154	      (SheafOfModules.unit S.ringCatSheaf ⟶ SheafOfModules.unit S.ringCatSheaf)) :
1155	    biproduct.matrix (f := fun _ : Fin n => SheafOfModules.unit S.ringCatSheaf)
1156	        (g := fun _ : Fin e => SheafOfModules.unit S.ringCatSheaf) mA ≫ biproduct.matrix mB
1157	      = biproduct.matrix (fun i q => ∑ p, mA i p ≫ mB p q) := by
1158	  refine biproduct.hom_ext' _ _ (fun i => biproduct.hom_ext _ _ (fun q => ?_))
1159	  simp only [Category.assoc, biproduct.ι_matrix_assoc, biproduct.matrix_π, biproduct.lift_desc,

1165	`matrixEndRect_comp`. Project-local. -/
1166	lemma matrixEndRect_comp_rect {S : Scheme.{0}} {n e d : ℕ}

1188	    M = N := by

1201	lemma freeMap_matrixEndRect {S : Scheme.{0}} {d r e : ℕ} (g : Fin e → Fin r)

1208	    (fun _ : Fin d => SheafOfModules.unit S.ringCatSheaf)).inv).mp ?_
1209	  refine biproduct.hom_ext _ _ (fun p => ?_)

1226	The Nakayama/covering step of `chartLocus_isOpenCover` needs pointwise (fibre-level)
1227	surjectivity of an epimorphism of sheaves of modules. Over an affine base this needs no
1228	stalk theory at all: the tilde functor `ModuleCat R ⥤ (Spec R).Modules` is fully
1229	faithful and additive, identifies the free sheaf with the tilde of the free module
1230	(`tildeFinsupp`), epimorphisms of modules are surjections, and free modules are
1231	projective — so any epimorphism between free sheaves on `Spec R` is *split*, and its
1232	presenting matrix admits a right inverse over the global sections. -/

1234	/-- **Epimorphisms between free sheaves of modules on `Spec R` split**: the splitting is
1235	transported through the fully faithful `tilde.functor` from the projectivity of the free
1236	module `Fin d →₀ R`. Project-local. -/
1237	lemma exists_section_of_epi_free_spec {R : CommRingCat.{0}} {d r : ℕ}
1238	    (ψ : SheafOfModules.free (R := (Spec R).ringCatSheaf) (Fin r) ⟶
1239	      SheafOfModules.free (R := (Spec R).ringCatSheaf) (Fin d)) [Epi ψ] :
1240	    ∃ Φ : SheafOfModules.free (R := (Spec R).ringCatSheaf) (Fin d) ⟶
1241	        SheafOfModules.free (R := (Spec R).ringCatSheaf) (Fin r),
1242	      Φ ≫ ψ = 𝟙 (SheafOfModules.free (R := (Spec R).ringCatSheaf) (Fin d)) := by
1243	  -- the tilde-conjugate of `ψ` and its module-level preimage under full faithfulness
1244	  let ψt : tilde (ModuleCat.of ↥R (Fin r →₀ ↥R)) ⟶ tilde (ModuleCat.of ↥R (Fin d →₀ ↥R)) :=
1245	    (tildeFinsupp (Fin r)).hom ≫ ψ ≫ (tildeFinsupp (Fin d)).inv
1246	  let g : ModuleCat.of ↥R (Fin r →₀ ↥R) ⟶ ModuleCat.of ↥R (Fin d →₀ ↥R) :=
1247	    tilde.fullyFaithfulFunctor.preimage ψt
1248	  have hg : tilde.map g = ψt := tilde.fullyFaithfulFunctor.map_preimage ψt
1249	  haveI hiso_r : IsIso (tildeFinsupp (R := R) (Fin r)).hom := inferInstance
1250	  haveI hiso_d : IsIso (tildeFinsupp (R := R) (Fin d)).inv := inferInstance
1251	  haveI hψt : Epi ψt := by
1252	    -- fully explicit: the `(Spec R).Modules` / `(Spec (.of ↥R)).Modules` defeq blocks
1253	    -- automatic instance search across the composite
1254	    haveI h1 : Epi (ψ ≫ (tildeFinsupp (Fin d)).inv) :=
1255	      @epi_comp _ _ _ _ _ ψ ‹Epi ψ› _ (IsIso.epi_of_iso _)
1256	    exact @epi_comp _ _ _ _ _ (tildeFinsupp (Fin r)).hom (IsIso.epi_of_iso _) _ h1
1257	  haveI hge : Epi g := by
1258	    refine (tilde.functor R).epi_of_epi_map ?_
1259	    show Epi (tilde.map g)
1260	    rw [hg]
1261	    exact hψt
1262	  have hsurj : Function.Surjective g.hom := (ModuleCat.epi_iff_surjective g).mp hge
1263	  -- a module-level section of `g` by projectivity of the free module
1264	  obtain ⟨w, hw⟩ := Module.projective_lifting_property g.hom LinearMap.id hsurj
1265	  refine ⟨(tildeFinsupp (Fin d)).inv ≫ tilde.map (ModuleCat.ofHom w) ≫
1266	    (tildeFinsupp (Fin r)).hom, ?_⟩
1267	  have hcomp : ModuleCat.ofHom w ≫ g = 𝟙 (ModuleCat.of ↥R (Fin d →₀ ↥R)) :=
1268	    ModuleCat.hom_ext (by
1269	      rw [ModuleCat.hom_comp, ModuleCat.hom_id, ModuleCat.hom_ofHom]
1270	      exact hw)
1271	  have hstep : (tildeFinsupp (Fin r)).hom ≫ ψ = tilde.map g ≫ (tildeFinsupp (Fin d)).hom := by
1272	    rw [hg]
1273	    simp only [ψt, Category.assoc, Iso.inv_hom_id, Category.comp_id]
1274	  calc ((tildeFinsupp (Fin d)).inv ≫ tilde.map (ModuleCat.ofHom w) ≫
1275	        (tildeFinsupp (Fin r)).hom) ≫ ψ
1276	      = (tildeFinsupp (Fin d)).inv ≫ tilde.map (ModuleCat.ofHom w) ≫
1277	        ((tildeFinsupp (Fin r)).hom ≫ ψ) := by simp only [Category.assoc]
1278	    _ = (tildeFinsupp (Fin d)).inv ≫ tilde.map (ModuleCat.ofHom w) ≫
1279	        tilde.map g ≫ (tildeFinsupp (Fin d)).hom := by rw [hstep]
1280	    _ = (tildeFinsupp (Fin d)).inv ≫ tilde.map (ModuleCat.ofHom w ≫ g) ≫
1281	        (tildeFinsupp (Fin d)).hom := by rw [← tilde.map_comp_assoc]
1282	    _ = (tildeFinsupp (Fin d)).inv ≫ 𝟙 _ ≫ (tildeFinsupp (Fin d)).hom := by
1283	        rw [hcomp, tilde.map_id]
1284	    _ = 𝟙 _ := by rw [Category.id_comp, Iso.inv_hom_id]

1289	lemma exists_rightInverse_of_epi_matrixEndRect_spec {R : CommRingCat.{0}} {d r : ℕ}
1290	    (M : Matrix (Fin d) (Fin r) Γ(Spec R, ⊤)) (h : Epi (matrixEndRect M)) :
1291	    ∃ G : Matrix (Fin r) (Fin d) Γ(Spec R, ⊤), M * G = 1 := by
1292	  haveI := h
1293	  obtain ⟨Φ, hΦ⟩ := exists_section_of_epi_free_spec (matrixEndRect M)
1294	  refine ⟨Matrix.of (fun q p => unitEndSection
1295	    (SheafOfModules.ιFree p ≫ Φ ≫ projFree q)), ?_⟩
1296	  have hpres : matrixEndRect (Matrix.of (fun q p => unitEndSection
1297	      (SheafOfModules.ιFree p ≫ Φ ≫ projFree q))) = Φ := matrixEndRect_unitEndSection Φ
1298	  apply matrixEndRect_injective

1319	      ⇑(CommRingCat.Hom.hom (Scheme.Hom.appTop S.isoSpec.inv)))) := by

1328	    simp

1330	  have hM : (M.map ⇑(CommRingCat.Hom.hom (Scheme.Hom.appTop S.isoSpec.inv))).map
1331	      ⇑(CommRingCat.Hom.hom (Scheme.Hom.appTop S.isoSpec.hom)) = M := by

1364	    (Scheme.Modules.pullbackBaseChangeTransport p a b
1365	        (Scheme.Modules.pullbackFreeIso a (Fin d) ≪≫ matrixToFreeIso M N hMN hNM ≪≫
1366	          (Scheme.Modules.pullbackFreeIso b (Fin d)).symm)).hom
1367	      = (Scheme.Modules.pullbackFreeIso (p ≫ a) (Fin d)).hom ≫

2481	/-! ### The Nitsure §1 inverse construction: chart loci, chart matrices, chart morphisms
2482	
2483	For a rank-`d` quotient `x = ⟨F, q⟩` on `T` and a size-`d` subset `I ⊆ Fin r`, the
2484	*chart composite* is `s_I ≫ q : O_T^d ⟶ F` (the `I`-indexed coordinate inclusion
2485	followed by the quotient map) and the *chart locus* `T_I ⊆ T` is the largest open on
2486	which it restricts to an isomorphism. The loci are open by construction (a supremum of
2487	opens), cover `T` (Nakayama at each point), and over `T_I` the quotient is presented by
2488	a `d × r` matrix of sections whose `I`-minor is the identity — its complementary
2489	entries determine a ring map `R^I ⟶ Γ(T_I, O)` and hence a morphism `T_I ⟶ U^I` by the
2490	Γ–Spec adjunction. These glue to the inverse `grPointOfRankQuotient` of the universal
2491	property. -/

2493	/-- The **iso-locus** of a morphism of sheaves of modules on a scheme: the supremum
2494	(union) of all opens `U` such that the pullback of `φ` to the open subscheme `U` is an
2495	isomorphism. This is the largest open on which `φ` is invertible. Project-local
2496	(Mathlib has no iso-locus for morphisms of sheaves of modules). -/
2497	def isoLocus {X : Scheme.{0}} {M N : X.Modules} (φ : M ⟶ N) : X.Opens :=
2498	  sSup {U : X.Opens | IsIso ((Scheme.Modules.pullback U.ι).map φ)}
2499	
2500	/-- Membership in the iso-locus: `t ∈ isoLocus φ` iff some open neighbourhood of `t`
2501	pulls `φ` back to an isomorphism. Project-local. -/
2502	lemma mem_isoLocus {X : Scheme.{0}} {M N : X.Modules} {φ : M ⟶ N} {t : X} :
2503	    t ∈ isoLocus φ
2504	      ↔ ∃ U : X.Opens, IsIso ((Scheme.Modules.pullback U.ι).map φ) ∧ t ∈ U := by

# Lean Audit Report

## Slug
